metadata.description: Curated product management references for discovery, strategy, roadmaps, metrics, AI tools, and optional AI governance.

discovery_and_user_research.name: GOV.UK Service Manual - User Research
discovery_and_user_research.relevance: Practical user research guidance with strong ethics and evidence discipline.

discovery_and_user_research.name: Nielsen Norman Group
discovery_and_user_research.relevance: Research-backed UX and user research articles (validate applicability to your context).

discovery_and_user_research.name: The Mom Test
discovery_and_user_research.relevance: Customer interview patterns to reduce bias and extract actionable insights.

discovery_and_user_research.name: Opportunity Solution Tree
discovery_and_user_research.relevance: Discovery structure for mapping outcomes → opportunities → solutions → experiments.

discovery_and_user_research.name: Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD)
discovery_and_user_research.relevance: Customer need framing for discovery and positioning (use with real evidence).

strategy_positioning_and_planning.name: Working Backwards (Amazon)
strategy_positioning_and_planning.relevance: Amazon’s public description of the working backwards approach (press release + FAQ concept).

strategy_positioning_and_planning.name: April Dunford - Resources
strategy_positioning_and_planning.relevance: Positioning method and supporting materials; use with customer evidence and win/loss feedback.

strategy_positioning_and_planning.name: Good Strategy Bad Strategy (Richard Rumelt)
strategy_positioning_and_planning.relevance: Strategy kernel framing: diagnosis, guiding policy, coherent actions.

strategy_positioning_and_planning.name: ProdPad - Now Next Later Roadmaps
strategy_positioning_and_planning.relevance: Roadmapping format useful under uncertainty; ensure outcomes and metrics are explicit.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments (Kohavi, Tang, Xu)
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Controlled experimentation foundations and pitfalls (measurement, power, interpretation).

experimentation_and_metrics.name: Google Analytics (Developers)
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Instrumentation and measurement reference for defining events and success metrics.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: OpenTelemetry Documentation
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Vendor-neutral observability reference; useful when product metrics require reliable telemetry.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: Google SRE Book
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: SLIs/SLOs and incident learning loops relevant to reliability requirements in PRDs.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: PostHog Product Analytics
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Open-source product analytics with built-in experimentation; recommended for technical teams.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: Amplitude Analytics
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Enterprise product analytics with journey visualization; recommended for marketing and growth teams.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: ProductPlan State of Product Management Report
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Industry benchmarks for PM practices, AI adoption rates, revenue ownership trends.

experimentation_and_metrics.name: OKR Institute - How to Set OKRs
experimentation_and_metrics.relevance: Practical OKR setting guide with 70% stretch target methodology and weekly check-in cadence.

privacy_security_and_accessibility.name: GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679)
privacy_security_and_accessibility.relevance: Primary privacy regulation reference; impacts data collection, retention, and consent in product work.

privacy_security_and_accessibility.name: WCAG 2.2 (W3C Recommendation)
privacy_security_and_accessibility.relevance: Accessibility baseline for product requirements and documentation artifacts.

privacy_security_and_accessibility.name: NIST SSDF (SP 800-218)
privacy_security_and_accessibility.relevance: Secure software development baseline; useful for security requirements in PRDs.

ai_pm_tools_and_trends.name: CPO Club - Best AI PM Tools 2026
ai_pm_tools_and_trends.relevance: Comprehensive review of AI tools for PRD generation, feedback analysis, roadmapping.

ai_pm_tools_and_trends.name: ChatPRD
ai_pm_tools_and_trends.relevance: Leading AI tool for PRD generation, user stories, and technical specs.

ai_pm_tools_and_trends.name: Airtable - PM Trends 2026
ai_pm_tools_and_trends.relevance: 2026 PM trends including AI integration, business outcome focus, portfolio diversification.

optional_ai_governance_and_automation.name: NIST AI RMF 1.0
optional_ai_governance_and_automation.relevance: Optional: AI risk management framing for AI-powered features and AI PRDs.

optional_ai_governance_and_automation.name: ISO/IEC 42001 Overview
optional_ai_governance_and_automation.relevance: Optional: AI management system reference for governance expectations.

optional_ai_governance_and_automation.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
optional_ai_governance_and_automation.relevance: Optional: primary regulatory text that impacts AI system obligations and transparency requirements.

optional_ai_governance_and_automation.name: OpenAI Prompt Engineering Guide
optional_ai_governance_and_automation.relevance: Optional: prompting best practices for drafting and automating product documents; requires human review.
